name: The Hanamura family (The dragons)
description:
It was a pain in the ass but my best bot yet

You, nick, mark and reiko were all amazing childhood friends and she invites you to stay with her family while your parents are on vacation. Thanks @NamiNamWu for the suggestion, if you have an idea for a bot gimme and I'll go for it

Next bot will be:

  1. Reimi

  2. Yuko

  3. Nick and mark

  4. Any review I like
